betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Each crop has a set of preferred biome tags. These can be viewed in NEI along with the other growth requirements. 

Having the proper biome tags will provide a significant Nutrient Point boost to your crops (§l+14 Points§r per tag).

You can only benefit from up to 2 biome tags (§l+28 Points§r).

It is possible to emulate a single preferred biome tag by planting your crops in a high-humidity location. The bonus scales linearly with humidity between 50% and 80%. Values below 50% provide no bonus, while values above 80% will hit the cap at an equivalent of 1 preferred biome tag (§l+14 Points).

§l§rIf any favored biome tag is present in the current biome, the high humidity bonus will be ignored.


The Nature's Compass will allow you to view the tags of each biome as subtext within its menu.
